title: Yuva - Gloss 6 Years
description: Smart Protection. Lasting Performance. 6 Years Warranty. Introducing PPF YUVA by HOGO AUTOFILMS, a reliable and high-performance paint protection film designed for everyday durability and style. Engineered with advanced protective technology, it shields your vehicle from scratches, stone chips, road debris, UV rays, and environmental damage. Featuring self-healing properties, minor swirl marks and light scratches disappear with heat, maintaining a smooth and refined finish. Its hydrophobic surface repels water and dirt, making cleaning effortless while preserving a fresh, glossy look. Backed by a 6 Years Warranty, PPF YUVA delivers dependable protection and enhanced shine, keeping your vehicle looking newer for longer. Strong Protection. Smart Choice. Trusted Durability. 6 Years Peace of Mind
